item.description:
These are not the droids you’re looking for. #injunction

item.title: Tweet - 71863612154724352
item.description:
Apparently Twitter is not as important or powerful as the Sunday Times, according to Max Clifford. Tell that to #egypt. #injunction

❤️ 0 | 🔃 1

item.title: Tweet - 71847481746522112
item.description:
Okay #lazyweb start tweeting random footballer names to annoy crazy #injunction lawyers. Then retweet anything that sticks. #NobbyStiles
